hero.name: Ahmet Hamdi Özen
hero.title: Full Stack & AI Engineer
hero.tagline: I turn complex ideas into production-grade software — from LLM-powered backends to pixel-perfect interfaces that users love.

about.heading: About Me
about.body: I'm a Full Stack & AI Engineer who thrives at the intersection of backend systems and machine intelligence. I architect end-to-end solutions with Python, FastAPI, and Next.js — then supercharge them with large language models. Whether it's a RAG pipeline, a real-time SaaS dashboard, or an AI chatbot handling hundreds of daily orders, I ship products that solve real problems.

contact.heading: Let's Build Something Together
contact.subheading: Available for full-time roles and select freelance projects. I respond within 24 hours.
